<!-- Thanks for contributing! Keep PRs small and focused. -->

**What this changes**
A short description of the change and why.

**How it was tested**
- [ ] `bash -n abs.sh install.sh` passes
- [ ] `shellcheck` clean (if installed)
- [ ] Exercised the affected flow (say how — before/after output helps for
      pairing, usage parsing, or prompt changes)

**Notes**
Anything a reviewer should know — trade-offs, follow-ups, or things you're unsure
about.
